context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified new /api/sensors endpoint and C++ Sensor Drivers display: 1) Backend /api/sensors returns sensor modes (imu, baro, gps, rangefinder, optical_flow) with values 'simulated' or 'hardware'. 2) hw_info sub-object contains i2c_available, imu_detected, baro_detected, gps_detected, spi_available, uart_available, imu_model, baro_model, gps_model. 3) Frontend DiagnosticsPanel fetches both /api/diagnostics and /api/sensors. 4) C++ Sensor Drivers section in Settings shows SIM/HW badges - all SIM in container (would show HW on real Pi with sensors). 5) native_bridge.py has fallback for get_sensor_modes() when C++ method not compiled in. Total 77 backend tests pass.

expected_on_real_pi.badges: HW for detected sensors, SIM for others
